LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ESMELDA RIOS AND SILVA CONCEPCION OCHOA DBA TROPI-GALA CLUB'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.
